description: Dwyer prepared a missing-teeth chart; separate chart reproduction preserved as DOC-0017.
current_evidentiary_value: High for existence; moderate for exact notation.
limitations: Chart image has no OCR and exact dental notation needs specialist/manual transcription.

description: Several teeth missing; Dwyer stated missing teeth would be noticeable if the man laughed but not necessarily if speaking.
Fingerprint chart of deceased male found at Somerton; separate visual reproduction preserved.
current_evidentiary_value: High for existence; limited for comparison without original/search logs.
limitations: Image quality moderate; fingerprint classification annotations need specialist review.

description: Durham fingerprinted deceased and circulated copies to Australian states, New Zealand and important overseas bureaus.
limitations: Full bureau response file not acquired.

description: Durham produced full-face and side-face photographs marked as exhibits.
limitations: Original photos/exhibit images not fully catalogued in Mission 8.

description: Lawson made a cast of the features; bust was later marked as exhibit C.17.
source: Paul Francis Lawson; Raymond Lionel Leane
limitations: Embalming/formalin and postmortem changes limit living-appearance inference.

description: Height/build not precisely measured in extracted medical pages; described as tallish and in good physical condition.
limitations: Need autopsy sheet or police physical description for exact measurements.

description: Light scar on left upper arm; uncertain vaccination mark; two recent right-hand abrasions noted.
source: John Matthew Dwyer; John Burton Cleland

description: Stomach contents, liver/muscle, urine and blood were submitted to Cowan.
current_evidentiary_value: High for 1948 submission; low for present availability.

description: Certified copy records unidentified male body and death registration details.
source: Registrar of Births, Deaths and Marriages
